landing.title: FATE OF YOURS
landing.subtitle: Unveil Your Path
landing.welcomeSub: Destiny awaits. Are you ready for a new reading?
landing.quote: "The cards do not tell you what will happen — they illuminate what already is within you."
landing.introP1: Tarot is a language of symbols, a mirror for the subconscious. It doesn't predict a fixed future, but reveals the hidden currents and potential paths shaped by your current energy.
landing.introP2: Our AI synthesis bridges ancient archetypal wisdom with modern psychological insight, offering a profound reflection on your deepest questions.
landing.introPullQuote: "The cards are a map, not a destination."
landing.benefitsSub: Discover how the wisdom of the deck can illuminate every facet of your existence.

benefits.title: Emotional Resonance
benefits.desc: Connect with your inner emotional landscape and find healing through symbolic reflection.

benefits.title: Strategic Pathing
benefits.desc: Identify hidden obstacles and opportunities in your career and creative pursuits.

benefits.title: Relational Depth
benefits.desc: Gain perspective on the dynamics of love, family, and social connection.

benefits.title: Financial Wisdom
benefits.desc: Understand the energy behind your material world and prosperity.

benefits.title: Spiritual Alignment
benefits.desc: Reconnect with your higher purpose and the universal flow.

benefits.title: Daily Guidance
benefits.desc: Navigate the small moments with mindfulness and intentionality.

landing.footerSub: Your journey of self-discovery is only a card away. Step into the circle and let the oracle speak.

auth.signupSub: Let the cosmos know who you are
auth.dobHint: Your birth date helps personalise your reading
auth.dobActive: ✦ Select your day, month, and year of birth

setup.heading: What is your heart seeking?
setup.sub: Select the domain of your inquiry and refine it with a specific question. The more focused your intent, the clearer the revelation.
setup.sectionSub: Each suit speaks to a different aspect of the human experience.
setup.chooseHint: Please select a domain and a question

deck.heading: Select Your Three Cards
deck.deckDesc: THE FULL TAROT DECK. UNIFIED AND WAITING
deck.guide: Let your intuition guide you — hover and click to select.
deck.readyHint: Your three cards are chosen — the veil is ready to lift

filters.noMatch: No readings match the selected filter.

empty.title: No readings yet
empty.desc: You haven't drawn any cards yet. When you do, your readings will appear here so you can reflect on them over time.
